prompt: A clean 2x3 photo grid collage of six real photographs of the same black Labrador Retriever puppy wearing a red bandana, arranged neatly with thin white borders between each photo. Each photo is a distinct candid life moment: (1) top-left: close-up face portrait, amber eyes looking at camera, tongue out, red bandana visible, shallow depth of field; (2) top-right: full body sitting on green farm grass, happy expression, warm afternoon light; (3) middle-left: running through green meadow, ears flopping, mid-air action shot, fast shutter speed frozen motion; (4) middle-right: lying on grass with paws stretched forward, relaxed sleepy expression, soft natural light; (5) bottom-left: playing with a red ball on the farm, caught mid-pounce; (6) bottom-right: looking up with big puppy eyes, close-up, soft bokeh background. All six photos same dog, same red bandana, same black glossy fur. Consistent warm natural outdoor lighting across all panels. Shot on Canon EOS R5, various focal lengths, natural farm environment. Real photography, no illustrations, no digital effects. White thin borders between photos, clean grid layout.
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, 3D render, CGI, different dogs, multiple breeds, plastic fur, dark indoor, studio lighting, oversaturated, digital art, painted, blurry, watermark

settings.quality: high detail, consistent dog identity across panels
